vocab.ex: I've got lots of friends. I think friendship is very important.
Are the lyrics of songs important to you, or just the music?
Stop singing along, I want to enjoy the music!
The sun is shining – let's go swimming.
Photos that you post on the internet never go away. They stay there forever.
It's raining! Let's go inside.
When you learn a new language, the first words you learn are always the basics.

vocab.de: wichtig nehmen; sich kümmern (um); sich interessieren (für)
vocab.ex: He said something negative about your clothes. I wear what I want, I don't care what he thinks.
You can't see somebody's shadow when there's no sun.
It doesn't matter if you win or lose, it's how you play the game.
What's your favourite flower? Probably roses, but only yellow ones.
Violet is the name of a flower and a colour.
If you say nothing, you are silent.
What's important for your happiness: family, friends, money, things?
My parents made me read an article about the dangers of social media.
The two brothers care for their parents at home. They spend a lot of time with them.
If you look at the lives of the stars, you see that a lot of them go through ups and downs.
Most people would agree that people really respect their best friends.
If you and somebody else stick together, it means you're very close to each other.
They're very good friends and always together. They stick together like glue!
Please sign the letter.
No, you can't bring a friend on holiday with us, sorry. But Dad, Emma isn't just a friend, she's my BFF!
He's very shy, so it isn't easy to break through his shell quickly.
Sometimes people feel the need to be with others, sometimes they need to be alone.
My phone fell onto the ground and broke.
Even with friends you sometimes have to pull them aside and tell them when they're doing something wrong.
Don't worry, everything is going to be alright.
He never does his homework, but somehow he always gets great marks.

vocab.en: to be out of second chances
vocab.ex: Please, just give me a second chance. Sorry, you've had more than one second chance; I'm out of second chances now.
I'm so interested in different countries; there are a lot of places on this earth I'd like to visit.
Hang on. I'll ask them.
No matter what the problem is, just call if you need my help!
I'll forgive you, but I can't forget what you did.

vocab.en: to be willing to do sth
vocab.de: gewillt sein, etw. zu tun; bereit sein, etw. zu tun
vocab.ex: How much are they willing to pay for the bike?
Dan, you've been online enough today. So be sensible and do your homework now.
Smartphones are practical for staying in touch with friends.

vocab.en: to sock sb in the eye
